title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Ramky Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Ramky Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Ramky Group has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Ramky Group:
Ramky Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ramky Group!
